**Confidential Internal Deal Memo**

Date: 15 October 2023  
Project Codename: Operation Emerald

To:  
Dr. Tan Wei Ming  
Head of Strategic Acquisitions  
Emerald Holdings Pte. Ltd.  
Email: tanweiming@emerald.sg  
Phone: +65 6123 4567  

From:  
Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah  
Senior Analyst  
Emerald Holdings Pte. Ltd.  

Subject: Proposed Acquisition of Sapphire Innovations Pte. Ltd.

We are pleased to present the initial assessment of the proposed acquisition of Sapphire Innovations Pte. Ltd. The target company operates under UEN 200312345Z and is a leading player in the tech solutions sector. Our recommended offer stands at SGD 45,000,000, subject to due diligence and board approval.

For further discussions, please coordinate with Mr. Ramasamy Muthu, our legal counsel, at ramasamy.muthu@emerald.sg.

NRIC for internal reference: S8765432B

Please review the attached detailed financial analysis and contact me for any clarifications.

Best regards,  
Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah
